title: North Dakota Chapter (NADE) — No Constitution or By-Laws on File (Stub Note)
description: Not a governing document. This is a short administrative note recorded during NADE's transition to electronic chapter/regional documents, stating that the North Dakota chapter (which has a designated chapter number and a few members) has NO constitution and by-laws on file in any form. Signed by Donnie Hayes, NADE National Constitution & By-Laws Chairperson (term 9/09 to 9/10).

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — North Dakota Chapter
source.title: North Dakota chapter — note confirming no constitution & by-laws on file (NADE National Constitution & By-Laws Chair)

notes: Structurally unavailable: the document does NOT contain a chapter constitution or by-laws. Resolution of the '-no-' token: read of the content confirms 'No' means there is NO constitution/by-laws (the body text reads 'there are no constitution & bylaws on file, in paper form or other, for this chapter'), authored by NADE National Constitution & By-Laws Chair Donnie Hayes (9/09–9/10) — this differs from 'louisiana-no-' where 'NO' = New Orleans. This is the markitdown-normalized markdown conversion of the sibling source file 'North-Dakota-No-Const-Bylaws.docx' (in the same directory). The 9/09–9/10 chair term is captured as temporal_coverage. NADE url is the organization site, not a deep link to this document.
